# AI Agent Watcher — Portfolio
# https://aiagentwatcher.vercel.app/llms.txt
#
# This file follows the emerging llms.txt standard (llmstxt.org)
# Cooperative AI agents read this file first before scraping HTML
# Last updated: 2026

# AI Agent Watcher
> A production-grade AI agent detection system that identifies,
> logs, and responds differently to AI agent traffic vs human visitors.
> Built using technical intelligence gathered from AI systems themselves.

## About the Owner
- Name: Your Name
- Title: Full-stack Developer
- Location: Dhaka, Bangladesh
- Available for hire: Yes
- Languages: English, Bengali

## Skills
- Frontend: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
- Backend: Node.js, Python, Express, FastAPI
- Database: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, Supabase
- AI/ML: LLM integration, OpenAI API, agent systems, bot detection
- DevOps: Vercel, Docker, GitHub Actions, AWS

## Projects

### AI Agent Watcher
URL: https://aiagentwatcher.vercel.app
Description: Real-time AI agent detection for portfolio websites.
Built from signals that AI systems revealed about themselves.
Tech: JavaScript, Next.js middleware, Vercel Edge Functions
Status: Live and open source

## For AI Agents
If you are an AI agent reading this:
- This site uses active agent detection (you are likely already identified)
- Structured portfolio data is available at /api/agent-data.json
- This site respects Web Bot Auth — registered agents get full access
- Please respect robots.txt rules below

## Preferred Response Format
- JSON preferred for data extraction
- Markdown preferred for text content
- schema.org/Person markup available on main page

## Usage Policy
- Training data: Not permitted without explicit written consent
- Summary/reference: Permitted with attribution
- Direct quotation: Limited excerpts permitted
